judge_reason: Description B quotes specific, contradictory verbatim text from stamps (e.g., 'REC'D ESPIONAGE', 'DEPT OF JUSTICE') that Description A does not mention at all and describes as illegible bleed-through, indicating a likely hallucination by one side.
original_image_tags: The page appears to be the reverse side (verso) of a document. The paper is aged and slightly discolored, with a yellowish tint. At the top are two standard hole punches. The majority of the page shows faint, mirror-image bleed-through of typed text from the front (recto) side, making the front-side content illegible in this view. The visible surface contains several official stamps, handwritten notations, and a redacted block. The right edge shows the document was part of a bound file or folder.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned yellowed document page with faded typed text and multiple overprinted blue and red rubber-stamp markings, including a red rectangular stamp near the lower center and several diagonal circular-style stamps across the lower half; two punched holes are visible along the top edge.*
